name: Pizza Swiss Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the steak; cut into 6 equal pieces.
2. Stir together flour, salt, and pepper; coat meat pieces with the flour mixture.
3. Pound each piece of steak to 1/2 inch thickness using a meat mallet.
4. In a skillet, brown the meat in hot cooking oil; drain off excess fat.
5. Place onion in a casserole dish or slow cooker.
6. Place meat on top of the onion.
7. Stir together tomato sauce, pizza sauce, water, sugar, and oregano; pour over the meat.
8. Cover; cook on low heat setting for 8 to 10 hours.
9. Serve steak and sauce over hot cooked spaghetti.
